title: Authors and Citation
text: Léopold Guyot. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Guyot L (2026). rtui: TUI Framework R. R package version 0.0.1, https://leopoldguyot.github.io/rtui/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {rtui: TUI Framework for R},   author = {Léopold Guyot},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.1},   url = {https://leopoldguyot.github.io/rtui/}, }

title: TUI Framework for R
text: declarative Terminal User Interface (TUI) framework R, backed FTXUI via Rcpp.

title: TUI Framework for R
text: need C++17-capable compiler toolchain. Linux: install distro’s standard C/C++ build tools (gcc/g++, make). macOS: install Xcode Command Line Tools (xcode-select --install). Windows: install Rtools. also need Rcpp R package:
code: install.packages("Rcpp")

title: TUI Framework for R
code: # install.packages("remotes") remotes::install_github("leopoldguyot/rtui")

title: TUI Framework for R
code: library(rtui)  app <- tuiApp(   ui = tuiColumn(     tuiOutputNumeric("counter"),     tuiOutputText("message"),     tuiOutputText("name"),     tuiRow(       tuiInputButton("Increment", id = "inc"),       tuiInputButton("Decrement", id = "dec"),       tuiInputButton("Apply name", id = "applyName")     ),     tuiInputCheckbox("Enabled", id = "enabled", value = TRUE),     tuiInputText(id = "nameInput", value = "John")   ),   server = function(input, output) {     counter <- tuiReactive(input$inc - input$dec)     appliedName <- tuiReactiveEvent(input$applyName, runAtInit = TRUE, {       input$nameInput     })      message <- tuiReactive({       counter()       currentName <- tuiIsolate(appliedName())       enabledState <- if (isTRUE(input$enabled)) "enabled" else "disabled"       paste0("counter changed while name is ", currentName, " [", enabledState, "]")     })      output$message <- tuiRenderText(message())     output$counter <- tuiRenderNumeric(counter(), digits = 0)     output$name <- tuiRenderText(paste("Your name is:", appliedName()))   } )  tuiRun(app, overflow = "clip")  # press Escape or Ctrl+Q to quit

title: TUI Framework for R
text: exported UI builders (tuiRow, tuiColumn, tuiBox, outputs, inputs) accept optional sizing arguments: width, height, minHeight, maxHeight, widthPercent, heightPercent. tuiRow(), tuiColumn(), tuiBox() also accept per-axis overflow policies overflowX/overflowY ("visible", "clip", "scroll"). Scroll containers expose -place scrollbars support keyboard/mouse scrolling. runtime, input$terminalWidth input$terminalHeight available reactive inputs server logic can react terminal resizing. tuiOutputTable() defaults overflowX = "scroll" overflowY = "scroll" wide tall data frames stay navigable inside constrained layouts. Set headerClickId tuiOutputTable() receive header click payloads input$... (column, columnIndex) behaviors like server-side sorting. Use tuiRenderTable() options (example rowBorder, colBorder, headerRowBorder, headerColBorder, borderStyle, columnAlign, cellOverflow) control table styling server-side. Navigate Tab / arrow keys, activate buttons Enter.

title: Create a TUI application — tuiApp
text: Defines terminal UI application UI tree server function. runtime runs server(input, output) initialization register outputs observers, re-evaluates invalidated reactive graph nodes input event.

title: Create a TUI application — tuiApp
code: tuiApp(ui, server)

title: Create a TUI application — tuiApp
text: ui UI component tree built tuiColumn(), tuiRow(), tuiBox(), tuiOutputText(), tuiOutputNumeric(), tuiOutputTable(), tuiInputButton(), tuiInputText(), tuiInputCheckbox(). server function called server(input, output). input output environments: input$<id> updated automatically buttons, text inputs, checkboxes, table header click events. input$terminalWidth input$terminalHeight automatically managed read-reactive inputs reflecting current terminal size. assign rendered outputs output$<name> <- tuiRenderText(...) output$<name> <- tuiRenderNumeric(...) / output$<name> <- tuiRenderTable(...). use tuiObserve() / tuiObserveEvent() reactive side effects.

title: Create a TUI application — tuiApp
text: object class rtuiApp.

title: Create a TUI application — tuiApp
code: app <- tuiApp(   ui = tuiColumn(     tuiOutputNumeric("counter"),     tuiInputButton("Increment", id = "inc")   ),   server = function(input, output) {     output$counter <- tuiRenderNumeric(input$inc)   } )

title: Box layout wrapper — tuiBox
text: Draws border around child component, optional title style.

title: Box layout wrapper — tuiBox
code: tuiBox(   child,   title = NULL,   color = NULL,   style = "rounded",   titleStyle = "header",   titleAlign = "left",   margin = 0L,   width = NULL,   height = NULL,   minHeight = NULL,   maxHeight = NULL,   widthPercent = NULL,   heightPercent = NULL,   overflowX = "visible",   overflowY = "visible" )

title: Box layout wrapper — tuiBox
text: child single rtuiComponent wrap. title Optional single character string title displayed border. Use NULL (default) title. color Optional border color. Supports named colors ("default", "black", "red", "green", "yellow", "blue", "magenta", "cyan", "graylight", "graydark", "redlight", "greenlight", "yellowlight", "bluelight", "magentalight", "cyanlight", "white") hex string like "#RRGGBB". style Border style. One "rounded" (default), "light", "dashed", "heavy", "double", "empty". titleStyle Title rendering style. One "header" (default), places title inside box header separated bar, "border", places title top-left border line. titleAlign Title alignment "header" mode. One "left" (default), "center", "right". margin Integer number spaces outside box (default 0). width, height Optional fixed width/height terminal cells. minHeight, maxHeight Optional min/max height terminal cells. widthPercent, heightPercent Optional relative size 0 1. widthPercent interpreted tuiRow() heightPercent tuiColumn() strict main-axis percentages. overflowX, overflowY Container overflow policy axis. Use "visible" (default) keep normal flow, "clip" crop child drawing container box axis, "scroll" enable scrollable viewport axis (Ctrl+Arrow, PageUp/PageDown, Home/End, mouse wheel, draggable scrollbar).

title: Box layout wrapper — tuiBox
text: rtuiComponent list node type "box".

title: Vertical layout container — tuiColumn

Child components built layout component functions. width, height Optional fixed width/height terminal cells. minHeight, maxHeight Optional min/max height terminal cells. widthPercent, heightPercent Optional relative size 0 1. widthPercent interpreted tuiRow() heightPercent tuiColumn() strict main-axis percentages. overflowX, overflowY Container overflow policy axis. Use "visible" (default) keep normal flow, "clip" crop child drawing container bounds axis, "scroll" enable scrollable viewport axis (Ctrl+Arrow, PageUp/PageDown, Home/End, mouse wheel, draggable scrollbar).

title: Button input component — tuiInputButton

text: label character string shown button label. id character string used input key (input$<id>). color Optional button color. Supports named colors ("default", "black", "red", "green", "yellow", "blue", "magenta", "cyan", "graylight", "graydark", "redlight", "greenlight", "yellowlight", "bluelight", "magentalight", "cyanlight", "white") hex string like "#RRGGBB". width, height Optional fixed width/height terminal cells. minHeight, maxHeight Optional min/max height terminal cells. widthPercent, heightPercent Optional relative size 0 1. widthPercent interpreted tuiRow() heightPercent tuiColumn() strict main-axis percentages.

title: Checkbox input component — tuiInputCheckbox

text: label character string shown checkbox label. id character string used input key (input$<id>). value single logical value used initial/default checkbox value. width, height Optional fixed width/height terminal cells. minHeight, maxHeight Optional min/max height terminal cells. widthPercent, heightPercent Optional relative size 0 1. widthPercent interpreted tuiRow() heightPercent tuiColumn() strict main-axis percentages.

title: Checkbox input component — tuiInputCheckbox
text: rtuiComponent list node type "checkbox".

title: Text input component — tuiInputText
text: focusable text input. typed value stored automatically input$<id> triggers server update change. input starts value. default (multiline = FALSE), Enter triggers submit without inserting newline. Set multiline = TRUE allow newlines.

title: Text input component — tuiInputText
code: tuiInputText(   id,   placeholder = "",   value = "",   multiline = FALSE,   width = NULL,   height = NULL,   minHeight = NULL,   maxHeight = NULL,   widthPercent = NULL,   heightPercent = NULL )

title: Text input component — tuiInputText
text: id character string used input key (input$<id>). placeholder character string shown input empty. value character string used initial/default input value. multiline single logical value. FALSE (default), Enter modify text content. TRUE, Enter inserts newline. width, height Optional fixed width/height terminal cells. minHeight, maxHeight Optional min/max height terminal cells. widthPercent, heightPercent Optional relative size 0 1. widthPercent interpreted tuiRow() heightPercent tuiColumn() strict main-axis percentages.

title: Text input component — tuiInputText
text: rtuiComponent list node type "input".

what: Evaluate an expression in isolation — tuiIsolate
title: Evaluate an expression in isolation — tuiIsolate
text: Evaluates expr without publishing reactive read-change information current server cycle. useful want current value reactive object without making act event trigger.

title: Evaluate an expression in isolation — tuiIsolate
code: tuiIsolate(expr)

title: Evaluate an expression in isolation — tuiIsolate
text: expr expression evaluate.

title: Evaluate an expression in isolation — tuiIsolate
text: evaluated value expr.

text: Registers observer re-evaluates expr dependencies invalidate.

title: Observe reactive values — tuiObserve
text: expr expression evaluate.

title: Observe reactive values — tuiObserve

title: Observe selected input/reactive events — tuiObserveEvent

title: Observe selected input/reactive events — tuiObserveEvent

title: Observe selected input/reactive events — tuiObserveEvent
text: event input$<id> / input[["id"]] reference, reactive call/object tuiReactive(), tuiReactiveVal(), tuiReactiveEvent(). expr expression evaluated event triggers. runAtInit single logical value. TRUE, evaluate app initialization.

title: Observe selected input/reactive events — tuiObserveEvent

title: Table output component — tuiOutputTable

title: Table output component — tuiOutputTable

title: Table output component — tuiOutputTable
text: outputId single character string naming output id. overflowX, overflowY Overflow policy table clipping/scrolling axis. Use "scroll" (default) make wide/tall tables navigable, "clip" crop viewport bounds, "visible" allow overflow. headerClickId Optional input id header click events. set, clicking table header cell updates input$<headerClickId> list containing column (name) columnIndex (1-based position). width, height Optional fixed width/height terminal cells. minHeight, maxHeight Optional min/max height terminal cells. widthPercent, heightPercent Optional relative size 0 1. widthPercent interpreted tuiRow() heightPercent tuiColumn() strict main-axis percentages.

title: Table output component — tuiOutputTable

title: Text output component — tuiOutputText

title: Text output component — tuiOutputText
text: outputId single character string naming output id. wrap Backward-compatible shortcut wrapped text. TRUE, behaves like overflow = "wrap". FALSE (default), behavior controlled overflow. overflow Text overflow policy. Use "clip" (default) keep single line clipped available width, "wrap" wrap text available width, "ellipsis" keep one line truncate ellipsis content exceeds available width. width, height Optional fixed width/height terminal cells. minHeight, maxHeight Optional min/max height terminal cells. widthPercent, heightPercent Optional relative size 0 1. widthPercent interpreted tuiRow() heightPercent tuiColumn() strict main-axis percentages.

title: Text output component — tuiOutputText
text: rtuiComponent list node type "outputText".

text: numeric renderer object assignment output$....

title: Create a numeric renderer for output$... — tuiRenderNumeric
text: Renderer expressions ideally side-effect free. tuiRender* expression mutates reactive state (example via tuiReactiveVal()), output can invalidate evaluation. case, rtui emits warning (per output id) still completes render pass.

title: Create a data-frame table renderer for output$... — tuiRenderTable
code: tuiRenderTable(   expr,   showRowNames = FALSE,   showHeader = TRUE,   outerBorder = TRUE,   rowBorder = FALSE,   colBorder = TRUE,   headerRowBorder = TRUE,   headerColBorder = TRUE,   borderStyle = "light",   borderColor = NULL,   headerBorderColor = NULL,   headerBold = TRUE,   headerColor = NULL,   headerBgColor = NULL,   zebraRows = FALSE,   zebraColorOdd = NULL,   zebraColorEven = NULL,   cellPaddingX = 0L,   cellPaddingY = 0L,   cellOverflow = "clip",   minColWidth = NULL,   maxColWidth = NULL,   columnAlign = NULL,   naText = "NA" )

title: Create a data-frame table renderer for output$... — tuiRenderTable
text: expr expression returning data frame (tibble). showRowNames Whether prepend row names first column. showHeader Whether header row shown. outerBorder Whether draw table outer border. rowBorder, colBorder Whether draw row column separators. headerRowBorder, headerColBorder Header-separators. applied corresponding global separator disabled: headerRowBorder rowBorder = FALSE, headerColBorder colBorder = FALSE. borderStyle Border style ("light", "dashed", "heavy", "double", "rounded", "empty"). borderColor, headerBorderColor Optional border colors. headerBold Whether header cells bold. headerColor, headerBgColor Optional header text/background colors. zebraRows Whether alternating row backgrounds enabled. zebraColorOdd, zebraColorEven Optional alternating row background colors. cellPaddingX, cellPaddingY Cell horizontal/vertical padding. cellOverflow Cell overflow policy ("clip", "wrap", "ellipsis"). minColWidth, maxColWidth Optional global min/max column width. columnAlign Optional per-column alignment ("left", "center", "right"), scalar, vector, named vector/list. naText Replacement text NA values table cells.

title: Create a data-frame table renderer for output$... — tuiRenderTable
text: table renderer object assignment output$....

title: Create a data-frame table renderer for output$... — tuiRenderTable
text: Renderer expressions ideally side-effect free. tuiRender* expression mutates reactive state (example via tuiReactiveVal()), output can invalidate evaluation. case, rtui emits warning (per output id) still completes render pass.

what: Require values to be available/truthy in reactive code — tuiReq
title: Require values to be available/truthy in reactive code — tuiReq
text: Stops current reactive/render evaluation supplied value considered available (falsy), similarly shiny::req().

title: Require values to be available/truthy in reactive code — tuiReq
code: tuiReq(..., cancelOutput = FALSE)

title: Require values to be available/truthy in reactive code — tuiReq
text: ... Values validate. cancelOutput Ignored now. Present API compatibility.

title: Require values to be available/truthy in reactive code — tuiReq
text: Invisibly returns first supplied value values truthy.

text: ... Child components built layout component functions. width, height Optional fixed width/height terminal cells. minHeight, maxHeight Optional min/max height terminal cells. widthPercent, heightPercent Optional relative size 0 1. widthPercent interpreted tuiRow() heightPercent tuiColumn() strict main-axis percentages. overflowX, overflowY Container overflow policy axis. Use "visible" (default) keep normal flow, "clip" crop child drawing container bounds axis, "scroll" enable scrollable viewport axis (Ctrl+Arrow, PageUp/PageDown, Home/End, mouse wheel, draggable scrollbar).

title: Run a TUI application — tuiRun
text: Starts terminal event loop rtuiApp. call blocking: takes terminal user presses Escape Ctrl+Q.

title: Run a TUI application — tuiRun
code: tuiRun(app, overflow = "clip")

title: Run a TUI application — tuiRun
text: app rtuiApp object created tuiApp(). overflow Overflow handling strategy content exceeds terminal size. Use "clip" (default) crop content visible terminal viewport, "scroll" wrap app global scrollable viewport. Use "block" temporarily block interaction show warning message terminal smaller app's minimum required size. setting global whole app. Per-container overflow can configured independently overflowX / overflowY tuiRow(), tuiColumn(), tuiBox().

title: Run a TUI application — tuiRun
text: Invisibly returns NULL.

what: Conditionally render a child component by terminal size — tuiShowIf
title: Conditionally render a child component by terminal size — tuiShowIf
text: Wraps single child component shows terminal dimensions satisfy specified constraints. useful responsive breakpoints (example, hiding secondary panels narrow terminals) keeping declarative static UI tree.

title: Conditionally render a child component by terminal size — tuiShowIf
code: tuiShowIf(   child,   minTerminalWidth = NULL,   maxTerminalWidth = NULL,   minTerminalHeight = NULL,   maxTerminalHeight = NULL )

title: Conditionally render a child component by terminal size — tuiShowIf
text: child single rtuiComponent conditionally render. minTerminalWidth, maxTerminalWidth Optional minimum/maximum terminal width (terminal cells) required show child. minTerminalHeight, maxTerminalHeight Optional minimum/maximum terminal height (terminal cells) required show child.

title: Conditionally render a child component by terminal size — tuiShowIf
text: rtuiComponent list node type "showIf".

title: Conditionally render a child component by terminal size — tuiShowIf
text: Conditions evaluated current terminal size rechecked rendering, visibility updates automatically terminal resized.
